title: Disclaimer
metaDescription: Read the ConvertBase.app disclaimer for calculator, converter and utility tool results.
heading: Disclaimer
content: The tools available on ConvertBase.app are provided for informational and educational purposes only. Results do not constitute financial, medical, construction, or legal advice. Before making decisions based on calculator outputs, please consult a qualified professional. We strive to keep our tools accurate, but we accept no liability for errors or for any decisions made based on the results provided.
